items.title: Ridge Tile Rebed and Weatherproofing
items.summary: Loose ridge tiles were lifted, cleaned, reset and finished to restore the weather line.
items.details: The inspection found movement along the ridge following exposed weather. The scope focused on safe access, rebedding, local tile checks and a tidy clean-down.

items.title: Domestic Re-Roof with Roofline Review
items.summary: A tired pitched roof renewed with attention to underlay, battens, covering and edge details.
items.details: The works were sequenced around scaffold access, weather windows and roofline checks so the finished roof looked clean and performed reliably.

items.title: Flat Roof Replacement
items.summary: A failing flat roof surface replaced after the deck, falls and perimeter details were reviewed.
items.details: The project addressed repeated water ingress by improving the roof surface and checking edge trims, upstands and drainage points.

items.title: Fascia, Soffit and Gutterline Upgrade
items.summary: Old roofline components replaced to improve appearance, ventilation and rainwater control.
items.details: The team reviewed timber condition, gutter falls and outlet positions before fitting replacement fascia, soffit and gutter sections.

items.title: Chimney Stack Repair and Flashing Check
items.summary: Chimney weathering details were repaired after damp appeared around the stack.
items.details: The visible stack, surrounding roof covering and lead junction were inspected before targeted repairs were completed.

items.title: Pre-Sale Roof Condition Inspection
items.summary: A roof condition check helped the owner prioritise minor repairs before listing the property.
items.details: The inspection reviewed visible roof coverings, roofline, gutters and vulnerable junctions, then grouped recommendations by urgency.
